build.buildCommand: if [ -d Backend ]; then cd Backend; fi && composer install --no-dev --optimize-autoloader --no-interaction && php artisan config:cache && php artisan route:cache && php artisan view:cache

deploy.startCommand: if [ -d Backend ]; then cd Backend; fi && php artisan migrate --force && php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=${PORT:-8080}
